meanings.definition: an act of formulating a program for a definite course of action
examples: the planning was more fun than the trip itself

meanings.definition: the act or process of drawing up plans or layouts for some project or enterprise
the cognitive process of thinking about what you will do in the event of something happening
examples: his planning for retirement was hindered by several uncertainties

meanings.definition: have the will and intention to carry out some action
examples: He plans to be in graduate school next year
The rebels had planned turmoil and confusion
He is planning a trip with his family

meanings.definition: make or work out a plan for; devise
examples: They contrived to murder their boss

meanings.definition: make a design of; plan out in systematic, often graphic form
examples: plan the new wing of the museum
